Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "STREETSOFLONDON-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Streets of London.prg"
Metadata.Notes: This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $C000 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers. 2. Sets $0351 to $60 (RTS) - it does this as there's a rather crude copy protection mechanism at the start of the program using a SYS 849 statement, which expects the RTS at the end of the filename loaded from tape. 3. Executes the RUN command to start the game program.
